name: Port Forwarding
description: Opens specific ports on the VPN connection for peer-to-peer file sharing or self-hosted services.
technicalExplanation: The VPN provider assigns a dedicated public port on the VPN exit server's external IP address. Incoming packets sent to that IP:port combination are forwarded through the VPN tunnel to the user's device via NAT rules. The mapping is typically configured through a web interface or API where the user specifies the external port and the internal destination IP:port on their local network. The VPN gateway maintains the stateful NAT entry for the duration of the VPN session.
advantages: Enables seeding in BitTorrent when the user is behind CGNAT (Carrier-Grade NAT) or a firewall that blocks inbound connections
Improves BitTorrent download speeds and swarm health by making the peer connectable from the public internet
Allows self-hosted services (Plex, HTTP servers, SSH) to be reachable without exposing the user's real home IP address
Bypasses ISP-level port blocking for specific applications (gaming consoles, VoIP)
disadvantages: Reduces anonymity by associating a persistent public-facing port with a single user's account over extended periods
Opens an inbound network path to the user's device; any service listening on the forwarded port must be properly secured
Requires the user to understand port numbers, TCP/UDP protocols, and application-level configuration
Not all VPN providers offer port forwarding due to operational complexity and abuse potential
idealUsers: Torrent users who want better seeding ratios and faster downloads by being connectable
Users who self-host services (Plex, game servers, home automation) and need inbound access without exposing their home IP
Gamers who need specific ports open for console or PC game hosting
VoIP and video conferencing users behind restrictive NATs that interfere with peer-to-peer media streams
securityImpact: Moderate negative impact; port forwarding opens an inbound path through the VPN tunnel to the user's device. The forwarded application must be properly secured, and the feature reduces anonymity by creating a persistent association between the user's account and a public port.
performanceImpact: Negligible; NAT-based port forwarding is simple packet header rewriting performed by the VPN gateway's kernel and adds no measurable latency or throughput reduction.
